artPrompt: A cluster of emboldened townsfolk waving from a sunlit street corner, arms raised in unison as a blurred car rolls past, blank lawn placards and picket fences hazing into golden afternoon light, leafy green and warm ivory crowd swelling behind, a bullhorn glinting, the cheerful rally tipping toward fervor, tender and lively, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Honk If You Agree
text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Then, any player at the table may honk (make a car-horn noise out loud). For each player who honks, you gain 1 life.
flavorText: The intersection has not been quiet since Tuesday. The recall thanks you for your support and your eardrums.
